name: blackscience-tech-skills
description: Research, evaluation, developer tooling, and document workflow skills.

metadata.description: Research, evaluation, developer tooling, and document workflow skills.

plugins.name: academic-zh-en-translation
plugins.description: Translate academic papers, theses, dissertations, abstracts, literature reviews, methods, results, captions, and reviewer responses between Chinese and English with source-faithful completeness, discipline-appropriate terminology, and target-language academic idiom.

plugins.name: agent-client-protocol
plugins.description: Implement or debug Agent Client Protocol (ACP) integrations between coding agents and clients/editors.

plugins.name: answer-judging
plugins.description: Judge response quality from thread-only evidence.

plugins.name: benchmark-builder
plugins.description: Build high-quality benchmark items, embedded scoring contracts, review examples, rubrics, evaluators, and release protocols for model and agent evaluation.

plugins.name: bfts-config-prep
plugins.description: Prepare a run directory and BFTS config for experiments from an idea JSON + idea.md. Use before running experiment-bfts-runner.

plugins.name: career-team-intel
plugins.description: Proactively research target companies/teams and key hiring decision makers (EM/TL/HM/recruiters) for job seeking using public, explicitly professional sources; interpret hiring-intent signals (e.g., leader "we're hiring" posts), score confidence, and produce a team brief + contact map + outreach messages + resume alignment.

plugins.name: citation-harvest
plugins.description: Query Semantic Scholar to collect citations and generate a deduplicated BibTeX file. Offline by default.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Safely simplify code with multi-metric quality gates.

plugins.name: data-to-viz
plugins.description: Route visualization tasks by Data-to-Viz chart family instead of choosing a library first.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-comparison-ranking
plugins.description: Design comparison and ranking visuals such as bars, lollipops, Cleveland dots, grouped intervals, and leaderboard-style summaries. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to comparison/ranking or when prompts ask who is bigger, what is the order, grouped bar chart, lollipop chart, or benchmark comparison; output a comparison-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-correlation
plugins.description: Design correlation visuals such as scatter plots, hexbins, 2D density views, and dense-point compatibility paths. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to correlation or when prompts ask about relationships between numeric variables, scatter plots, dense point clouds, or regression-style comparison; output a correlation-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-distribution
plugins.description: Design distribution visuals such as histograms, density curves, box plots, violin plots, beeswarms, and ridgelines. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to distribution or when prompts ask about spread, skew, tails, outliers, or grouped distributions; output a distribution-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-evolution
plugins.description: Design evolution visuals such as line charts, connected trajectories, and ordered-step summaries. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to evolution or when prompts ask how something changes over time, epoch, step, iteration, or sequence order; output an evolution-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-flow
plugins.description: Design flow visuals such as Sankey, alluvial, chord, and transition-oriented network views. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to flow or when prompts ask about movement, transfer, transition, or connection volume; output a flow-chart shortlist and a backend recommendation. This family is doc-first in v1.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-map
plugins.description: Design map visuals such as point maps, choropleths, and dense geographic views. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to map or when prompts ask for locations, stations, spatial density, choropleths, or geospatial overlays; output a map-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared map generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-multivariate
plugins.description: Design multivariate visuals such as heatmaps, small multiples, pair plots, correlograms, and other many-variable layouts. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to multivariate or when prompts ask to show several variables together and no simpler chart family is enough; output a multivariate-chart shortlist or a backend recommendation plus the shared minimal generator path.

plugins.name: data-to-viz-part-to-whole
plugins.description: Design part-to-whole visuals such as stacked bars, normalized bars, treemaps, and sunburst-like composition views. Use after `data-to-viz` routes a task to part-to-whole or when prompts ask how a total is composed; output a composition-chart shortlist and a backend recommendation. This family is doc-first in v1.

plugins.name: experiment-bfts-runner
plugins.description: Run the standalone BFTS experiment pipeline to execute multi-agent tree-search experiments from a prepared bfts_config.yaml. Use after idea-to-markdown and bfts-config-prep to produce logs, workspaces, and experiment artifacts.

plugins.name: experiment-log-summarizer
plugins.description: Summarize an experiment run directory into a draft report (Markdown + JSON) by scanning logs, summary JSONs, figures, and artifacts without executing code.

plugins.name: figure-caption-ref-audit
plugins.description: Extract figure screenshots, captions, and in-text figure references (figrefs) from a PDF into an audit bundle (images + figures.json).

plugins.name: hpc-batch
plugins.description: Troubleshoot Slurm/LSF batch jobs, arrays, and stuck-job issues.

plugins.name: huggingface-suite
plugins.description: Hugging Face Hub / datasets / training / evaluation / tracking / Gradio 的统一入口（vendored）。

plugins.name: idea-to-markdown
plugins.description: Convert idea JSON into a structured idea.md (optionally embedding a code snippet).

plugins.name: latex-to-word
plugins.description: 将 LaTeX (.tex) 文件转换为 Word (.docx) 格式。通过自动预处理解决 pandoc 对自定义命令、tabularx、resizebox 等的兼容性问题，最大限度减少后续手动调整。

plugins.name: nix
plugins.description: Explain, write, and debug Nix expression language + common Nix workflows (flakes, nix CLI, nixpkgs).

plugins.name: paper-reviewer
plugins.description: Review academic papers (PDF/LaTeX/Markdown) with a ScholarEval-inspired dimension pass and produce both structured peer-review JSON (NeurIPS-style fields) and a concise human-readable review with prioritized, actionable feedback. Use for comprehensive, targeted, or comparative paper evaluation while keeping output bounded.

plugins.name: paper-visualizer
plugins.description: Orchestrate standalone paper-visualization workflows with skill-packaged agents, scripts, style guides, and inspectable run artifacts.

plugins.name: project-simplify
plugins.description: Reduce repository complexity by de-vendoring large third-party sources and replacing them with pinned release artifacts, checksum verification, and minimal subset extraction.

plugins.name: python-performance-tuning
plugins.description: Improve Python runtime and memory performance with a profile-first workflow.

plugins.name: pytorch-lightning
plugins.description: Deep learning framework (PyTorch Lightning). Organize PyTorch code into LightningModules, configure Trainers for multi-GPU/TPU, implement data pipelines, callbacks, logging (W&B, TensorBoard), distributed training (DDP, FSDP, DeepSpeed), for scalable neural network training.

plugins.name: research-ideation-novelty-check
plugins.description: Generate and refine research ideas and run a lightweight novelty sanity-check using Semantic Scholar.

plugins.name: research-impact-strategy
plugins.description: Decide whether a research idea, experiment thread, or paper draft is worth pursuing and how to sharpen it into one high-impact claim.

plugins.name: research-suite
plugins.description: 科研写作、EDA、统计分析、可视化统一入口（vendored）。

plugins.name: rust-quality-simplify
plugins.description: Rust-focused alias of `code-simplifier`.

plugins.name: scientific-paper-writeup
plugins.description: Drafting or revising scientific papers (LaTeX or Markdown) from experiment logs, ideas, plots, and citations with section-by-section guidance, citation hygiene, page-limit constraints, and LaTeX QA.

plugins.name: skill-manager
plugins.description: 管理和演进 Codex skills：创建/更新/审计 SKILL.md 与配套 scripts/references/assets，盘点已安装 skills，校验和转换 Claude Code skills，同步来源并构建 vendored suites，检查共享 runtime 的准备情况，并避免在本仓库重复维护 openai/skills 已提供的官方技能.

plugins.name: token-cost-tracker
plugins.description: Summarize token usage and cost records from JSON or JSONL logs.

plugins.name: wenyan-quality-simplify
plugins.description: Simplify Wenyan language source code (`.wy`, especially `wenyan.wy`) with strict quality gates while preserving semantics.

plugins.name: writeup-icbinb
plugins.description: Draft a 4-page ICBINB-style LaTeX paper from idea JSON, summary artifacts, and plot manifest. Offline by default.

plugins.name: writeup-normal
plugins.description: Draft a normal-length LaTeX paper from idea JSON, summary artifacts, and plot manifest. Offline by default.

plugins.name: wsl-fs
plugins.description: Use when the task needs to work with projects stored in the WSL Linux filesystem, including path translation, entering a distro, finding repos under /home, and running build or git commands in WSL instead of on Windows.

plugins.name: zotero
plugins.description: Capture (Zotero Connector), manage, search, and export Zotero libraries and citations using Zotero desktop + Better BibTeX, the Zotero Web API, a local Zotero data directory, or user-provided export files.
